projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.overview: Designed and built a full-stack portfolio platform to showcase projects, experiences, and technical capabilities through a structured, API-driven architecture.
features: Dynamic project and experience content rendered from structured JSON APIs
Responsive UI with smooth navigation and interactive components
Integrated resume download and external profile links
Custom UI interactions including hover effects and cursor-based visual feedback
engineering: Designed a schema-driven content system using FastAPI and Pydantic for structured API responses
Implemented a data-driven frontend architecture in Vue 3 to render project content dynamically
Built modular composables for scroll handling, UI state management, and interaction effects
Integrated CI/CD pipeline with Docker and Google Cloud Run for automated deployment
projects.architecture: Vue 3 frontend → FastAPI backend → JSON content layer → Pydantic schema validation → Cloud Run deployment
tradeoffs: JSON-based content simplifies updates but lacks real-time CMS capabilities
Single backend service reduces complexity but limits independent scaling of features
Client-side rendering improves flexibility but increases frontend responsibility
future: Introduce CMS or admin interface for content management
Expand API versioning and content modularization

projects.title: AI Care Website
projects.overview: Developed a full-stack web platform for AI-assisted elderly care with real-time image analysis for environment awareness, backed by modular Flask APIs and a responsive Bootstrap interface.
features: AI-assisted elderly care workflows delivered through a web interface
Real-time environment awareness powered by OpenCV image analysis
Interactive health-education pages with responsive UI design
engineering: Implemented modular Flask API boundaries to keep feature logic maintainable
Integrated image-processing steps into API flows for near real-time feedback
Designed SQLite-backed persistence for lightweight deployment and iteration
projects.architecture: Frontend UI -> Flask API modules -> OpenCV analysis pipeline -> SQLite storage -> User-facing recommendations
tradeoffs: Monolithic Flask service simplified delivery but limited independent scaling of compute-heavy analysis
SQLite minimized ops overhead but is not ideal for concurrent write-heavy traffic
future: Move image analysis to asynchronous workers for better throughput
Add model-quality monitoring and dataset/version tracking
Migrate to PostgreSQL for higher concurrency and operational resilience

projects.title: Financial Report Crawler
projects.overview: Built an automated crawler for TWSE financial statements to streamline analysts' data-preparation workflows with end-to-end retrieval and file organization.
features: Automated statement download from TWSE sources
Dynamic page handling with Selenium-based browser automation
Structured extraction and output organization for downstream analysis
engineering: Combined Selenium interaction with BeautifulSoup parsing to handle mixed dynamic/static content
Designed deterministic file naming and storage conventions for repeatable batch runs
Reduced manual analyst effort by converting multi-step retrieval into one automated workflow
projects.architecture: Scheduler/trigger -> Selenium crawler -> BeautifulSoup parser -> Structured file output -> Analyst data pipeline
tradeoffs: Browser automation improved compatibility but increased runtime and maintenance cost
Site-structure changes can break selectors and require ongoing scraper updates
future: Add incremental crawl checkpoints and retry queues
Support multi-source report ingestion beyond TWSE
Publish cleaned outputs through an API interface

projects.title: yt_pod
projects.overview: Built a media integration pipeline that retrieves, transcribes, and summarizes updates from YouTube channels and podcast feeds into structured datasets.
features: Unified ingestion from YouTube and podcast platforms
Automated speech-to-text transcription for new media items
Summary generation to accelerate review and downstream analysis
engineering: Integrated multiple external APIs into a single normalized ingestion workflow
Used Whisper-based transcription to convert audio content into machine-readable text
Applied GPT-powered summarization to produce concise, comparable content snapshots
projects.architecture: YouTube/Podcast APIs -> Ingestion service -> Whisper transcription -> GPT summarization -> Structured dataset output
tradeoffs: LLM summarization improves speed but introduces variability in summary consistency
Transcription quality depends on source audio clarity and language characteristics
future: Add quality scoring and human-in-the-loop review for summaries
Introduce vector indexing for semantic search across episodes/videos
Expose pipeline results through a lightweight dashboard

projects.title: Enterprise System Development @ eZoom
projects.overview: Delivered end-to-end development for large-scale enterprise systems across frontend, backend, databases, deployment automation, and production operations.
features: Implemented full-stack modules spanning Vue interfaces and backend service APIs
Designed relational schemas and data workflows across MSSQL and PostgreSQL
Built CI/CD automation and handled production release operations on Windows Server + IIS
engineering: Developed .NET 8/C# APIs alongside Python FastAPI microservices for domain-specific workloads
Planned database schemas and query strategies based on system analysis documentation
Integrated deployment pipelines to reduce release friction and improve delivery consistency
projects.architecture: Vue frontend modules -> .NET/FastAPI service layer -> MSSQL/PostgreSQL data layer -> CI/CD pipeline -> Windows Server (IIS) production
tradeoffs: Hybrid stack increased implementation flexibility but raised integration complexity
On-prem style Windows/IIS deployment improved control but required more operational maintenance
future: Increase service decomposition boundaries to improve independent scaling
Expand automated testing gates in CI/CD before production rollout
Standardize observability dashboards for API and database performance
